personal.name: Kurmachalam Nandhini
personal.bio: I am a first-year B.Tech student who builds production-ready web experiences. While most of my peers are learning basic syntax, I am already interning as a Web Developer and architecting dynamic frontend interfaces. I obsess over clean UI/UX, responsive design, and scalable code. I am eager to contribute effectively to team-based projects and take on high-impact challenges.

projects.title: Premium Developer Portfolio Engine
projects.description: Engineered a high-performance, fully responsive portfolio using a decoupled architecture where all UI content is fetched dynamically from a JSON data layer, featuring custom DOM animations and 3D tilt interactions.

projects.title: Campus Navigation System
projects.description: A frontend interactive web application developed to help students, faculty, and visitors efficiently navigate the Malla Reddy University campus, utilizing responsive CSS grids and semantic HTML.

internships.description: Collaborated with senior engineers to build UI components for enterprise applications. Gained hands-on experience with modern web development workflows, Git version control, and responsive UI/UX implementation.
